raw_transcript: During a flare, stick to a low-fiber, 'white' diet. Think plain pasta, white rice, and lean proteins. Avoid raw vegetables and seeds for now as they can irritate the inflamed areas. We'll talk more once the CT results are in.
final_corrected_note: During a flare, stick to a low-fiber, 'white' diet. Think plain pasta, white rice, and lean proteins. Avoid raw vegetables and seeds for now as they can irritate the inflamed areas. We'll talk more once the CT results are in.
